message:
feat(calibrate): add posterior predictive checks and multi-class calibration

Implements PPC analysis comparing observed feature frequencies with model
predictions to detect misspecification, plus multi-class calibration curves
with per-class Brier score, ECE, and bias metrics.

Closes process_triage-72j.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
